pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires role name 'Safety Auditor'
Task description explicitly requires description 'Read-only access for external safety audits'
Task description explicitly requires assigning exactly the privileges 'View Patients' and 'View Encounters'

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly require creating a role named 'Safety Auditor' with the description 'Read-only access for external safety audits' and assigning exactly two privileges: 'View Patients' and 'View Encounters'. These constraints directly dictate the ground truth for verification.
